content:
# Kerogen Type

**Summary**: The classification of organic matter based on its ability to generate specific types of hydrocarbons.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] determined the kerogen type using HI and OI values from pyrolysis.

## Scientific Context

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Determines whether the source rock is oil, gas, or mixed potential.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Calculation of HI (S2/TOC) and OI (S3/TOC).

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Most lithofacies fall into the category of mixed Type II/III and Type III kerogen. ([[2020-usman|Usman, 2020, p. 54]])
